title: PowerTech
description: A mod that adds a lot of Technology
body:
🎉 PowerTech V2 – Update 2.2.4.5 Released!

The long-awaited PowerTech V2 is here with update 1.2.0! This version brings new features, improvements, and bug fixes to enhance your gameplay experience.

🔽 Download the Latest Version:

Mod File (v2.2.4.5) – [[Download Here]](https://modrinth.com/mod/powertech/version/2.2.4.5)

📄 View the Changelog:

Changelog (v1.2.0) – [[Read More via CurseForge]](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/powertech/files/6543865)

❓ What is PowerTech?

PowerTech is a technology-focused mod that introduces a variety of new blocks, items, and mechanics to improve and simplify gameplay. It's currently in beta, so some bugs may still occur – but we're working hard on daily fixes!
👉 Please report any bugs in the comments.

⚙️ Features & Highlights:

🔁 Duplicator Block

Use the Duplicator along with Duplicate Chips to clone ores and items!
Example: 1 Iron Ingot + 16x Duplicate Chip = 16 Iron Ingots

Note: Works best with stackable items. Non-stackable items like swords may produce unintended behavior.

💠 Duplicate Chips

These chips are used by the Duplicator to perform duplication. They're essential for mass production of resources.

💎 Flux Ore

A rare and valuable ore found in Lush Caves. Keep an eye out!

📘 Tutorial Book

Learn how to use all of PowerTech’s features and recipes with the in-game Tutorial Book.

🔍 For the best experience, we recommend using JEI (Just Enough Items) to view all available recipes.

⚠️ Known Issues

Using a full stack of Duplicate Chips (e.g., x64) with non-stackable items like swords may result in unintended stacks.
🧪 Tip: Shift + right-clicking with the stack may let you interact with it in funny ways. 😄

Stay tuned for future updates – and thank you for supporting PowerTech!

 

Development: NasumiCraft; NCRFD License
